description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the front and embroidered branding at the backFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron on reverseThis puma T-shirt has an exclusive casual style and a great look. The print on the tee ups your style quotient, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or tracks and canvas shoes to look your best.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
